Log a step start

Source: R/utils-logging.R
mysterycall_log_step.Rd

Log a step start

Usage

mysterycall_log_step(step_name, detail = NULL, n_items = NULL)

Arguments

step_name

Name of the step

detail

Optional additional details

n_items

Number of items to process (for progress tracking)

Value

invisible(NULL); updates the internal step counter and emits a formatted step header to the console.

See also

Other logging utilities: mysterycall_format_duration(), mysterycall_log_cache_hit(), mysterycall_log_error(), mysterycall_log_info(), mysterycall_log_progress(), mysterycall_log_save(), mysterycall_log_step_complete(), mysterycall_log_success(), mysterycall_log_warning(), mysterycall_progress_callback(), mysterycall_progress_finish(), mysterycall_progress_start(), mysterycall_progress_summary(), mysterycall_progress_tracker(), mysterycall_tracker_fail(), mysterycall_tracker_update(), mysterycall_use_quiet_logging(), mysterycall_workflow_end(), mysterycall_workflow_start()

Examples

mysterycall_workflow_start("Demo", total_steps = 2)
#> ============================================================
#>   Demo
#>   Started: 2026-05-11 23:50:45
#>   Total Steps: 2
#> ============================================================
#> 
mysterycall_log_step("Step 1: Geocode", n_items = 50)
#> ▶ Step 1/2: Step 1: Geocode
#>   Processing 50 item(s)...
